adjustments: Nico Schlotterbeck ruled out of the World Cup, prompting discussion of how Germany may need to adjust their build-up structure
Antonio Rüdiger is suggested as the direct replacement, though the text notes he does not offer Schlotterbeck’s same ability to build play
phases.summary: This phase is not a live tactical passage but a commentary update on Germany’s squad issue: Nico Schlotterbeck is ruled out, which affects their ability to progress the ball from the back. The discussion centres on how Julian Nagelsmann might compensate, with Antonio Rüdiger named as the likely replacement but not an equivalent in build-up terms.
